title: DNA Extraction with QIAGEN Mini Blood kit (modification for double swab)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6e0qk","text":"This procedure is modified from the Mini Blood QIAGEN kit Protocol and is intended to be used when two buccal swabs from the same individual are intended to be processed at the same time.  The original protocol ,  can be consulted in https://qiagen.com/HB-0329.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: In a 2 mL tube, place 200 µL of PBS and 150 µL of ATL buffer, then add both swabs to the tube + vortex for 00:00:15 .
Incubate at 85 °C for 00:10:00 at 1400 rpm, °C, and spin (30 seconds).
Add 20 µL of proteinase K + vortex for 00:00:15 .
Incubate at 56 °C for 00:45:00 at 1400 rpm, °C, and spin 00:00:30
Add 400 µL of AL buffer + vortex for 00:00:15
Incubate at 70 °C for 15 minutes at 1400 rpm, °C, and spin 00:00:30
Precipitate with 400 µL of freezing cold absolute ethanol + vortex for 00:00:15 or with micropipette
Transfer 700 µL of the solution to the kit column, let it rest for 00:01:00 and centrifuge at 8000 rpm, °C, for 00:02:00 .
Transfer the column to a new collection tube. Transfer 700 µL of the solution to the column, let it rest for 00:01:00 , and centrifuge at 8000 rpm, °C, for 00:02:00 .
Discard the flow-through and transfer the column to a clean collection tube.
Add 500 µL of AW2 buffer to the column, let it rest for 00:01:00 , and centrifuge at 8000 rpm, °C, for 00:02:00 .
Discard the flow-through and transfer the column to a clean collection tube.
Add 500 µL of AW2 buffer to the column, let it rest for 00:01:00 , and centrifuge at 12000 rpm, °C, for 00:05:00 .
Discard the flow-through and transfer the column to a clean 1.5-2 mL tube.
Add 65 µL of AE buffer to the column, incubate at 30 °C for 00:15:00 .
Centrifuge at 6000 rpm, °C, for 00:02:00 .
Add 65 µL of AE buffer to the column, incubate at 30 °C for 00:15:00 .
Centrifuge at 6000 rpm, °C, for 00:02:00 .
Store at -20 °C
Clean the area and pipettes using 70% Ethanol. Take out 2 tubes of 2 mL for each pair of swabs to be processed. Label the tubes with thesample ID. Set the hotplate to 85 °C
creator: Paula Reyes
